at_voice_range_blocked_prefixes_scoped_u.name: at_voice_range_blocked_prefixes_scoped_unique_active
at_voice_range_blocked_prefixes_scoped_u.where: "at_voice_range_blocked_prefixes"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "at_voice_range_blocked_prefixes"."at_voice_range_id" IS NOT NULL

chat_contacts_owner_xor.name: chat_contacts_owner_xor
chat_contacts_owner_xor.value: (("chat_contacts"."user_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("chat_contacts"."carrier_id" IS NOT NULL)::int) = 1

voice_cdrs_fx_rate_matches_currency.name: voice_cdrs_fx_rate_matches_currency
voice_cdrs_fx_rate_matches_currency.value: ("voice_cdrs"."buy_currency" = "voice_cdrs"."sell_currency" AND "voice_cdrs"."fx_rate" IS NULL) OR ("voice_cdrs"."buy_currency" <> "voice_cdrs"."sell_currency" AND "voice_cdrs"."fx_rate" IS NOT NULL)

voice_trunk_blocked_prefixes_scoped_uniq.name: voice_trunk_blocked_prefixes_scoped_unique_active
voice_trunk_blocked_prefixes_scoped_uniq.where: "voice_trunk_blocked_prefixes"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "voice_trunk_blocked_prefixes"."voice_trunk_id" IS NOT NULL

voice_trunks_auth_userpass_complete.name: voice_trunks_auth_userpass_complete
voice_trunks_auth_userpass_complete.value: "voice_trunks"."auth_type" NOT IN ('userpass','both') OR ("voice_trunks"."username" IS NOT NULL AND "voice_trunks"."password_encrypted" IS NOT NULL)
